title: InvariantTileSnapshot
description: Runtime snapshot of invariants and metrics for a single region/dungeon tile or node.

id.description: Stable identifier for this snapshot instance, e.g., a UUID or composite key.

schemaRef.description: Schema version identifier for invariant tile snapshots.

objectKind.description: Object kind tag for routing and validation.

regionId.description: Region or regionContractCard identifier that owns this tile.

dungeonId.description: Optional dungeonRunContract or dungeon identifier when this tile belongs to a dungeon map.

tileId.description: Engine-facing tile or node identifier, e.g., nodeId in a NODE_GRID topology.

tileClass.description: Tile class label used by the spine (spawn, boss, liminal, hub, deadend, saferoom, etc.).

topology.description: Optional topology details for this tile/node, mirroring dungeon-node-contract topology semantics where applicable.

topologyModel.description: Traversal model for this node (e.g., NODE_GRID, CONTINUOUS_3D, ROOM_GRAPH).

connections.description: Outgoing connections from this node. May be a projected subset of the full dungeon-node-contract topology.

targetNodeId.description: Node identifier this connection leads to.

kind.description: Optional semantic tag for the connection (standard, door, ladder, secret, etc.).

weight.description: Abstract traversal cost used for selector scoring and routing. Default semantics: 1.0 = baseline edge cost.

distance.description: Optional physical distance or engine units between nodes, if exposed.

invariants.description: Canonical invariant snapshot for this tile, using spine-defined ranges.

metricSnapshot.description: Optional entertainment metrics snapshot for this tile in the current session.

traversalCost.description: Optional pre-aggregated traversal cost for entering this tile, as seen by selectors. Default semantics: 1.0 = baseline cost; values >1.0 are more costly, values <1.0 are cheaper.
